faqs.question: Why is tick control important in Castle Hill?
faqs.answer: Castle Hill's parks, yards, and proximity to natural areas make it vulnerable to tick populations that can transmit Lyme disease and other serious illnesses. Professional tick control protects your family and pets from these health risks, especially if you spend time outdoors near Castle Hill Park or have a yard where ticks can hide in grass and vegetation.

faqs.question: When is tick season in Castle Hill, Bronx?
faqs.answer: Ticks are most active in Castle Hill from April through October, with peak activity in spring and fall. However, ticks can survive year-round in protected areas, so year-round prevention or early spring treatments are recommended to keep your Castle Hill property tick-free throughout the entire season.

faqs.question: Are your tick control treatments safe for my Castle Hill home?
